title: 3 Transport-Service Stocks to Watch Amid Industry Hiccups
text: The Zacks Industry Rank for the Transportation-Services industry paints a dull picture mainly owing to the slowdown in freight demand. We believe stocks like EXPD, CHRW and MATX are better positioned to escape industry challenges.
